column8: Not all people above 50 can interact through phone as they are not that used too to the technology, and all old people may not be able to connect to younger generation as the condition are different for both the generation, we have different thinking, different resources and different goals then them, they have life experience that would be useful in some aspects like 20% scenario but most of them would be unrelated .

I feel like old generation might take  a lot of time to accept this kind of change and as the new generation believes in fast life , they would be least bothered to take such kind of idea , also  in today's world nobody has a lot of time to attend such kind of sessions hardly they spend time with their family due to increase of work load . Some  might like the idea but everyone is not the same . 
Otherwise the Idea is great.

column8: First of all the idea is perfect. Although the technology has been grown alot in this era.So when ever you feel little bit demotivate you can watch some sort of motivation video.But that motivation is last long for 2 -3 day.So U need some kind of reason,purpose in your life I think finally it depends all on you whether you want to do it or not. So whenever U talk to you grandparent they have very strong postive vibe they tell U how to handle life outside your academic specially our youth need all this information  . I myself had experience of 5 -6 yr haven't talk to my grandparents busy in my own work. One modification which i liked to mention that there should be 2-3 person of age 50 and 1 single person of age 18 onwards  because they can listen both person point of view on same topic and do comparison of both person view and understand it on wider range...
